heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 423l–6 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out sections 423–1 to 423–6 of this title.ll
notes: References in TextSections 423–1 to 423–6 of this title, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title V of , , , which enacted sections 423–1 to 423–6 of this title and repealed sections 423j to 423 of this title. For complete classification of title V to the Code, see Tables.lllllPub. L. 106–511114 Stat. 2373Nov. 13, 2000
